questions.template: Water flows horizontally through a pipe at {v1} m/s with pressure {p1} Pa. At a section where the speed is {v2} m/s, what is the pressure? (ρ = 1000 kg/m³)
A tank has a small hole at depth {h} m below the water surface. What is the speed of water exiting the hole? (Torricelli's theorem, g = 9.8 m/s²)
Water enters a horizontal pipe at {v1} m/s with pressure {p1} Pa, and exits at {v2} m/s. What is the exit pressure? (ρ = 1000 kg/m³)
A pipe rises a height of {h} m. Water enters at {v1} m/s and pressure {p1} Pa, and the speed at the top is {v2} m/s. What is the pressure at the top? (ρ = 1000 kg/m³, g = 9.8 m/s²)
